index.title: Introduction
index.description: Overview of the Year Zero Engine: key concepts, dice types, tools of the game, and core design pillars.

index.title: Player Characters
index.description: Player character creation, attributes, archetypes, skills, health, resolve, gear, encumbrance, and experience advancement.

index.title: Skills & Specialties
index.description: How skills work in the Year Zero Engine: rolling dice, successes, pushing rolls, modifiers, and gear.

skill-rolls.title: Skill Rolls & Modifiers
skill-rolls.description: Detailed rules for skill rolls: pushing, panic, passive rolls, modifiers, difficulty, advantage, and opposed rolls.

skill-list.title: The Skills & Specialties
skill-list.description: Complete list of the twelve core skills and all specialties available to player characters, including magic specialties.

maps-and-zones.title: Maps, Zones & Initiative
maps-and-zones.description: Combat zones, range categories, rounds, initiative, and surprise rules.

actions.title: Actions & Movement
actions.description: Slow and fast actions, movement, retreat, ambushes, and sneak attacks.

close-combat.title: Close Combat
close-combat.description: Close combat mechanics: attacks, blocking, special attacks, and modifiers.

ranged-combat.title: Ranged Combat
ranged-combat.description: Ranged combat mechanics: aimed fire, modifiers, ammunition, full-auto fire, and overwatch.

damage.title: Damage, Conditions & Recovery
damage.description: Weapons, damage, stress, body armor, cover, conditions, broken state, and recovery rules.

critical-injuries.title: Critical Injuries & Hazards
critical-injuries.description: Critical injury tables, death, healing crits, trauma, and other hazards: darkness, fire, explosions, falling, poison, disease, cold, and more.

vehicles-and-chases.title: Vehicles & Chases
vehicles-and-chases.description: Vehicle stats, vehicle damage, repairs, critical vehicle damage, chase rules, and chase obstacles.

casting.title: Magic Rules
casting.description: How magic works in the Year Zero Engine: learning magic, spells, spell ranks, casting, mishaps, rituals, and general spells.

druid-spells.title: Druid Spells
druid-spells.description: Druidic magic disciplines: Awareness, Healing, and Shapeshifting spell lists.

sorcery-spells.title: Sorcery Spells
sorcery-spells.description: Sorcery disciplines: Blood Magic, Death Magic, Elementalism, and Symbolism spell lists.

travel-rules.title: Travel Rules
travel-rules.description: Travel maps, terrain types, tasks, weather, marching, forced march, and navigation rules.

driving-and-mounts.title: Driving & Mounts
driving-and-mounts.description: Driving rules, driving at night, mishaps, fuel, mounts, and driving mishap tables.

camp-and-survival.title: Camp & Survival
camp-and-survival.description: Keeping watch, foraging, hunting, making camp, camp mishaps, cooking, sleeping, exploring, resting, and water travel.
